notes.sg-vascular-disease-atherosclerotic-vasc: This is a subset of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
notes.sg-vascular-disease-arterial-disease: This is a subset of atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
notes.sg-vascular-disease-secondary-prevention: Secondary prevention is a strategy for managing existing disease, not a type of vascular disease itself.
notes.sg-vascular-disease-atherosclerotic-card: This is the most appropriate and encompassing label.
